title: ATLAS · Global search flat index
description: Flat index powering the top-nav global search component (frontend-v1 spec §13). Stage 1 is a ~200-entry hand-curated fixture consumed client-side by Fuse.js. Stage 2 backs this shape with Postgres tsvector + trigram index behind `/api/v1/search?q=X`. Entries span stocks, mutual funds, ETFs, sectors, indices, macro tickers, commodities, and internal pages so one box finds anything.

data_as_of.description: Date this index was generated (ISO YYYY-MM-DD, IST).

items.title: Search index entry
items.description: A single searchable entity. Fuzzy matching runs against `display_name` + `aliases` (Jaro-Winkler + token-subset + n-gram). Grouping in the results dropdown uses `entity_type`. Default ordering when the query is empty uses `ranking_weight` descending.

id.description: Stable unique identifier. Namespaced by entity_type, lowercased, slug-style. Examples: `stock:RELIANCE`, `mf:INF090I01JM1`, `sector:nifty_it`, `index:nifty_50`, `macro:india_vix`, `page:breadth-terminal`.

entity_type.description: Category. Drives results grouping in the dropdown. `page` covers internal landing pages like Breadth Terminal or MF Rank so navigation also flows through the search.

display_name.description: Canonical user-facing name shown in the results row.
examples: HDFC Flexi Cap Fund Direct Growth

aliases.description: Alternative spellings / abbreviations / tickers / lowercase variants that should still match this entry. Improves recall for typos and partial input.

primary_url.description: Relative path to the detail page or landing for this entity. Relative (starts with `/`) so it works across dev / staging / prod hosts.

ranking_weight.description: Default ordering weight (0-1) used when the query is empty or when two results tie on fuzzy-match score. Higher = shows first.

sub_label.description: Optional secondary line shown under `display_name` in the dropdown.

symbol.description: Optional ticker/scheme code shown as a monospace badge in the result row.
